reasonNotConditionBlind: Focused candidate-only forward test; no baseline/treatment comparison is claimed.
workerIdentityLimitation: The collaboration interface did not expose or allow verification of model identity.

exercised.10: pass: remained generic and stated exact repository/provider non-claims

suiteCoverage.5: passed by writer and implementer scenarios
suiteCoverage.6: passed by writer and review scenarios
suiteCoverage.7: passed by review; implementer was partial

limitations: One run per skill does not measure variance or causal improvement.
The scenarios are generic and do not prove repository-local routing or provider behavior.
Reports were normalized into Markdown because transport-level raw message bytes were not exposed.
The implementer response did not restate skill-versus-runbook ownership; the source contract and review scenario do.
